reviews.review_description: I keep spawning through the floor and wont let me do anything

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We are looking into the issue and will try to fix this in the future. If you want to leave extra information about what went wrong or your specific hardware you can always contact us at hitlab@howest.be.

reviews.review_description: Will not let me complete the first thing. Still a really educational experience.

reviews.review_description: Great application if you want to learn how to work with dangerous woodcrafting machines in a safe environment!
